summary: Added Client.GraphQL targeting the AWS AppSync endpoint with Authorization-header (JWT) auth, plus GOODREADS_GRAPHQL_TOKEN env/config wiring; new 'rating set'/'rating clear' commands fire RateBook/UnrateBook.
reason: Live capture (2026-05-28) proved star ratings are GraphQL-only on the modern UI; the generator had no GraphQL path and no rating command. This is the core correctness gap that deferred PR #894.
validated_outcome: rating set --dry-run posts {operationName:RateBook, variables.input.rating} to the appsync-api host with an Authorization header; live writes gated by GOODREADS_PP_ALLOW_WRITES.
